options.name: progression_balancing
options.description:
A system that can move progression earlier, to try and prevent the player from getting stuck and bored early.

A lower setting means more getting stuck. A higher setting means less getting stuck.

options.name: accessibility
options.description:
Set rules for reachability of your items/locations.

**Full:** ensure everything can be reached and acquired.

**Minimal:** ensure what is needed to reach your goal can be acquired.

options.name: enable_time_limit
options.description:
If the time limit is enabled, when time is up, any remaining items are forever encrypted, potentially making the
seed unbeatable without cheating.

options.name: time_limit_in_minutes
options.description:
If the time limit is enabled, the number of minutes until any remaining items are forever encrypted. Has no effect
if "Enable Time Limit" is disabled.

options.name: maximum_pharcoin_cost
options.description: Maximum number of Pharcoins that are needed to decrypt any given item.

options.name: extra_pharcoins_per_player
options.description: Extra Pharcoins in the item pool per player.

options.name: number_of_items_per_block
options.description: Number of items to encrypt in each block.

options.name: number_of_item_blocks
options.description:
Number of blocks of items there are. Any items encrypted in a block require a certain percentage of items to be
decrypted in the previous block to be eligible for decrypting.

options.name: required_percentage_of_items_decrypted_for_block_unlock
options.display_name: Required Percentage of Items Decrypted for Blocks to Unlock
options.description: The percentage of items that need to be decrypted in an earlier block to decrypt items in the next block.

options.name: starting_password
options.description: A password that's required to start Pharcryption. Useful for game hosts that want to start it instead.

options.name: local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be in their native world.

options.name: non_local_items
options.description: Forces these items to be outside their native world.

options.name: start_inventory
options.description: Start with the specified amount of these items. Example: "Bomb: 1"

options.name: start_hints
options.description: Start with these item's locations prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: start_location_hints
options.description: Start with these locations and their item prefilled into the ``!hint`` command.

options.name: exclude_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an important item.

options.name: priority_locations
options.description: Prevent these locations from having an unimportant item.

options.name: item_links
options.description: Share part of your item pool with other players.
